title: sourcing map S Hanging Hooks, 5inch(120mm) Extra Long Steel Hanger, Indoor Outdoor Uses for Garden, Bathroom, Closet, Workshop, Kitchen, Matt Silver, 2Pcs
features: [What You Get] - You will get 2pcs matt silver S shape hanging hooks which fits max 32mm pole: Length: 120mm/ 4.72inch; Thickness: 5mm/ 0.2inch; Opening Diameter: 32mm/ 1.26inch

[Material & Design] - These metal hooks are made of carbon steel with a smooth painted surface, sturdy and durable, not easy to get rust or erosion.Designed with S shapes streamlined and extra-long, integrally formed, it can withstand lots of force without deformation or rupture

[Easy to Use] - Good organizing tool. S-hook can easily hang on poles, shelves, bars, or ropes without the need for nails, screws, or adhesives. You can hang heavy objects without worrying about them falling

[Multiple Use Tool] - These S hooks can be used on different occasions indoor or outdoor like kitchen, garden, bathroom, closet, garage, home or office, and more. They are not limited to applying in a specific area. You can hang kitchen utensils, bath supplies, plants, clothes, shoes and so on which is convenient and saves space
[Note] - Its load-bearing limit is approximately up to 30 kg/ 66lb. Please confirm the size of the hook and ensure the applying places before buying
description: Product Description S Hanging Hooks This S hook surface is rust-resistant, slipping, and resist falling, you don't need to worry that these hooks would scratch your clothes or purse, scarf, or jeans among using. Multiple Use S Hanging Hook Well Made & Stylish This hook is made from premium carbon steel for durability and strength. One end has an opening for cup holders or flat wall hangers, while the other end is perfect for hanging glasses, pots, teapots, and coffee cups. Good Organizing or Decorating Tool This S-hook is a simple and excellent solution for hanging items in the kitchen, pantry, workshop, or garage where space is limited. Simply hang it from a rack, wall rail, or shelf. Practical Utility Hook Multi-purposed These S-shaped hooks can be used in a variety of indoor or outdoor applications, such as in the kitchen, garden, bathroom, wardrobe, garage, workshop, home or office, etc. These hooks are not limited to use in a specific space. Note Please confirm the size of the hook and ensure the application is placed before buying. Application They can be used for many things: hanging kitchen utensils, spoons, pots, or cups in the kitchen; towels, brushes, clothes, or other utensils in the bathroom; pots, plants, or gardening tools in the garden; clothes and shoes in the wardrobe. Features These hooks with a smooth painted surface, are sturdy and durable, not easy to get rust or erosion. Designed with S shapes streamlined and extra-long, withstands lots of force without rupture. This S-shaped hook is a very simple solution for storing all kinds of things. The S hook is easy to hang on the pole. You can hang heavy objects without fear of them falling. Widely Application For Cups By having a couple of S-Hooks, you can keep essential kitchen necessities hanging on the wall and close at reach. For Clothes You can hang bags, keys, pants, scarves, necklaces, bracelets, and ties to tidy up your living room and save space. For Plants Place a pole or shelf near a sunny window or in the garden and hang plants on an S-shaped hook to make the space more organized and secure.
